Effective Date: March 10, 2026

We collect workspace profile information, audit logs, document metadata, support tickets, and product usage data to provide the service, secure tenant accounts, investigate abuse, and support administrators.

We do not export a user's workspace activity to another tenant, contractor, or account owner unless an authorized administrator requests it through the approved export workflow.

We retain audit logs for security and compliance purposes and do not delete them immediately in response to ordinary user deletion requests.
